Class Round

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.round.Round
Direct Known Subclasses:
PlayRound, ScoreRound
public abstract class Round extends Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Round

      public Round(ArrayList<Player> players)
      A constructor for the abstract Round class instantiating the players.
      Parameters:
      players - The players playing.

  • Method Details

    • processRoundOutcome

      public HashMap<Player,Integer> processRoundOutcome(HashMap<Player,Integer> tricksWon) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A method for processing the outcome of the round according to the number of tricks won per player.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the sum of number of tricks won isn't 13.

      Precondition: The sum of the number of tricks won is equal to the NUMBER_OF_TRICKS: tricksWon.values().stream().mapToInt(Integer::intValue).sum() != NUMBER_OF_TRICKS

      Precondition: Each player has a valid number of tricks won: for (Player player : tricksWon.keySet()) tricksWon.get(player) >= 0 && tricksWon.get(player) <= NUMBER_OF_TRICKS

    • nbOfTricksWonPerPlayerValid

      public static boolean nbOfTricksWonPerPlayerValid(int[] nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer)
      A method for verifying the validity of an array containing the number of bids won per player.
      Parameters:
      nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer - An array containing the number of tricks won per player.
      Returns:
      true if the length matches the amount of players, and the total number of tricks won matches the total number of tricks, otherwise false

    • determineBidDeclarers

      protected static ArrayList<Player> determineBidDeclarers(HashMap<Player,BidType> bids, BidType finalBid)
      Determines all players who are part of the team declaring the given final bid. High Cohesion GRASP: Abstracted so both PlayRound and ScoreRound can use it.
      Parameters:
      bids - The map of bids each player made.
      finalBid - The highest bid that was made.
      Returns:
      A list of the players declaring this bid.

    • getFinalBid

      public Bid getFinalBid()
      Returns the final bid.

    • getPlayers

      protected ArrayList<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns the players playing in this round.

    • getTricksWon

      public LinkedHashMap<Player,Integer> getTricksWon()
      Returns a map containing the number of tricks won per player.

    • getTrickCountPerRound

      public static int getTrickCountPerRound()
      Returns the number of tricks in the round.

    • getHighestBid

      protected static BidType getHighestBid(HashMap<Player,BidType> bids)
      Finds the highest bid from a map of bids. High Cohesion GRASP: Abstracted so both PlayRound and ScoreRound can use it.
      Parameters:
      bids - The map of bids each player made.
      Returns:
      The highest BidType.

    • setFinalBid

      protected void setFinalBid(Bid bid)
      Sets the final bid.
      Parameters:
      bid - The bid to set.

    • setFinalBid

      public void setFinalBid(BidType bidType, ArrayList<Player> declarers, boolean wasFirstTry) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A method for setting the final bid in this round.
      Parameters:
      bidType - The bid type of the chosen bid.
      declarers - The names of the players declaring this bid.
      wasFirstTry - True, if the bid was chosen in the first try False, otherwise.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The bidType is not valid.

      Precondition: bidType is of a valid type: bidType.isValidBid()

    • setWasFirstTry

      public void setWasFirstTry(boolean wasFirstTry)
      Set whether this round was played on the first try.
